name: cline-sdk-examples
description: Comprehensive examples for building with the Cline SDK

scripts.about:session-host: echo 'createSessionHost works without the CLI app: it can run local in-process sessions and falls back to local backend when RPC is unavailable.'
scripts.all:beginner: bun run 01 && bun run 02 && bun run 03 && bun run 04
scripts.all:intermediate: bun run 05 && bun run 06 && bun run 07 && bun run 08 && bun run 09
scripts.all:advanced: bun run 10 && bun run 11 && bun run 12 && bun run 13
